---
title: "Machine Learning"
listing:
  contents: projects
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
---

Welcome to the Machine Learning section! This site is dedicated to exploring Machine Learning concepts and building practical models. 

We will make heavy use of core Python data science libraries such as `numpy`, `pandas`, and `scikit-learn`.

It's imporant to note that this isn't intended to be an highly rigorous academic resource or even scientific research; these are just my notes and experiences, often conveyed in an informal manner.  

## Projects
